title: AIDRA — OBDP Value (Downlink)
description: On-board data processing value: compression ratio, bandwidth savings, daily capacity.

panels.title: Data Compression Ratio
panels.description: Image bytes vs. realistic GeoJSON result bytes (~200 B envelope + 300 B per detection). Empty runs (zero detections) are excluded so the ratio reflects scenes where the OBDP value chain actually produced an output.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    ROUND(AVG(
        (e.image_size_mb * 1024.0 * 1024.0) / NULLIF(
            200 + GREATEST(e.num_detections, 0) * 300, 0
        )
    )::numeric, 0) AS compression_ratio
FROM execution_log e
WHERE e.status = 'success'
    AND e.image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
    AND e.image_size_mb > 0
    AND e.num_detections > 0

panels.title: Total Bandwidth Saved (GB)
panels.description: Total bandwidth saved by transmitting only results instead of full images.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    ROUND((
        SUM(e.image_size_mb)
        - SUM((200.0 + GREATEST(e.num_detections, 0) * 300.0) / (1024.0 * 1024.0))
    )::numeric / 1024.0, 2) AS bandwidth_saved_gb
FROM execution_log e
WHERE e.status = 'success'
    AND e.image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
    AND e.image_size_mb > 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_processed
FROM execution_log e
WHERE e.status = 'success'
    AND e.image_size_mb IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Downlink Time: Without vs With OBDP
panels.description: Downlink time comparison by satellite/link profile: without OBDP (full image) vs with OBDP (results only).

targets.rawSql:
WITH avg_sizes AS (
    SELECT
        ROUND(AVG(image_size_mb)::numeric, 1) AS avg_image_mb,
        ROUND(AVG((200.0 + GREATEST(num_detections, 0) * 300.0) / (1024.0 * 1024.0))::numeric, 6) AS avg_result_mb
    FROM execution_log
    WHERE status = 'success'
        AND image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
        AND image_size_mb > 0
),
downlink_types AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('S-band (0.5 Mbps)', 0.5),
        ('X-band (50 Mbps)', 50.0),
        ('Ka-band (300 Mbps)', 300.0),
        ('Laser (1800 Mbps)', 1800.0)
    ) AS t(link_type, mbps)
)
SELECT
    d.link_type,
    ROUND((a.avg_image_mb * 8 / d.mbps)::numeric, 2) AS "Without OBDP (sec)",
    ROUND((a.avg_result_mb * 8 / d.mbps)::numeric, 4) AS "With OBDP (sec)"
FROM avg_sizes a
CROSS JOIN downlink_types d
ORDER BY d.mbps

panels.title: Daily Capacity (images/day) by Downlink Profile
panels.description: Daily image-processing capacity per downlink profile.

targets.rawSql:
WITH avg_sizes AS (
    SELECT
        ROUND(AVG(image_size_mb)::numeric, 1) AS avg_image_mb,
        ROUND(AVG((200.0 + GREATEST(num_detections, 0) * 300.0) / (1024.0 * 1024.0))::numeric, 6) AS avg_result_mb
    FROM execution_log
    WHERE status = 'success'
        AND image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
        AND image_size_mb > 0
),
downlink_profiles AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
        ('S-band (0.5 Mbps)', 0.5, 10),
        ('X-band (50 Mbps)', 50.0, 10),
        ('Ka-band (300 Mbps)', 300.0, 10),
        ('Laser (1800 Mbps)', 1800.0, 5)
    ) AS t(link_type, mbps, contact_min_per_day)
)
SELECT
    d.link_type AS "Downlink Type",
    d.mbps AS "Link Speed (Mbps)",
    d.contact_min_per_day AS "Contact (min/day)",
    FLOOR((d.contact_min_per_day * 60 * d.mbps / 8.0) / a.avg_image_mb) AS "Without OBDP (img/day)",
    FLOOR((d.contact_min_per_day * 60 * d.mbps / 8.0) / NULLIF(a.avg_result_mb, 0)) AS "With OBDP (img/day)",
    ROUND(
        FLOOR((d.contact_min_per_day * 60 * d.mbps / 8.0) / NULLIF(a.avg_result_mb, 0))::numeric
        / NULLIF(FLOOR((d.contact_min_per_day * 60 * d.mbps / 8.0) / a.avg_image_mb)::numeric, 0),
        0
    ) AS "Improvement Factor"
FROM avg_sizes a
CROSS JOIN downlink_profiles d
ORDER BY d.mbps

panels.title: Compression Ratio Over Time
panels.description: Time series of the compression ratio per execution.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    e.created_at AS "time",
    ROUND(
        (e.image_size_mb * 1024.0 * 1024.0) / NULLIF(
            200 + GREATEST(e.num_detections, 0) * 300, 0
        )
    , 0) AS compression_ratio
FROM execution_log e
WHERE e.status = 'success'
    AND e.image_size_mb IS NOT NULL
    AND e.image_size_mb > 0
    AND e.num_detections > 0
    AND $__timeFilter(e.created_at)
ORDER BY e.created_at
